title: Difference-in-Differences for Evaluating Changes in Health Care Policy
source: U-Michigan CEHR, School of Public Health

L2: Methodological visual abstract on difference-in-differences analysis in health policy evaluation
Addresses non-parallel trends in policy evaluation
L3: U-Michigan CEHR visual abstract explaining the difference-in-differences methodology for evaluating changes in health care policy. Addresses coping with non-parallel trends. Part of CEHR's methodological guidance for health policy researchers.
